scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
